events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario involves fall protection equipment with frayed/burned webbing. This is clearly non-compliant as damaged webbing compromises the integrity of fall protection equipment. OSHA 1926 Subpart M and 1910.140 require that personal fall protection equipment be inspected and removed from service if damaged. Frayed/burned webbing would fail inspection and must be removed from service.

Decision: fail
Risk: critical (fall protection failure could lead to death)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded
Percent complete: maybe 80-90% since rough-complete
Confidence: high, 0.95
